name: Hidden-Frosting Carrot Zucchini Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and lightly flour an 8 x 8 x 2 inches baking pan; set aside.
2. For the filling, in a small mixing bowl, combine cream cheese and 1/3 cup of the sugar. Beat with an electric mixer on medium speed until fluffy.
3. Add 1 egg to the mixture and beat until smooth. Set aside.
4. In a large mixing bowl, stir together biscuit mix, 1/3 cup sugar, and pumpkin pie spice. Mix in shredded carrot, shredded zucchini, oil, 2 eggs, and vanilla.
5. Beat on low speed for 30 seconds, then beat on medium speed for 2 minutes.
6. Pour half the batter into the prepared pan. Spoon filling atop.
7. Spoon remaining batter over the filling.
8. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 35 to 40 minutes or until done. Cool on a wire rack.
9. To serve, sift powdered sugar over cake if desired. Cut into squares.
